text: What if robots could learn from their mistakes just like us? They use a method called reinforcement learning. It's all about trial, reward, and policy. In this process, a robot tries different actions, gets feedback, and learns the best approach. But there's a catch! Simulated environments often don't match real life. This sim-to-real gap means a robot may struggle when faced with actual tasks. Curious about how robotics will evolve? Hit like and follow for more!
